meta.title: Become a tutor · LessonRadar
meta.description: Free tutor profile for private teachers in Gaziantep and major Turkish cities. Verified identity, transparent pricing, get matched with real lesson requests.

hero.title: Share what you teach. Get matched with real requests.
hero.subtitle: Students post lesson requests in Gaziantep and major cities every day. Build your profile, our team reviews and approves it, and matches start coming through.

no_fee.title: Free profile
no_fee.description: No commission, no subscription. When you agree with a student, you get paid directly.

verified.title: Verified tutor badge
verified.description: Identity- and diploma-verified tutors rank higher in search results.

local_demand.title: District-level demand
local_demand.description: Match by district, not just city. Stay close to home; skip requests from across town.

transparency.title: Transparent pricing
transparency.description: Set your own hourly range. It's shown clearly on your profile — no hidden surprises.

how.title: Live in three steps.

one.title: Fill in the application
one.description: Subject, city, hourly range, biography. Takes 5–8 minutes.

two.title: Our team reviews it
two.description: Identity and diploma verification happens in a separate step over email; we'll be in touch.

three.title: Profile live, matches start
three.description: Approved profiles appear in search and city × subject pages; matched lesson requests reach your phone.

how.verification_note: Document upload isn't enabled yet. Approval currently happens over email with our team.

apply.title: Start your application in 5 minutes
apply.body: Once approved, your profile appears in search results and city × subject pages, and matching students reach you. Every step is auto-saved.
apply.bullet_autosave: Auto-saved steps — leave and resume anytime.
apply.bullet_review: Our team reviews within 3 business days.
apply.cta_helper: If you don't have an account yet, you'll be asked to register first, then redirected back here.

onboarding.policy_notice: Verification and listing depend on our team's review. This page is not an offer of employment.

steps.s1_title: Tell us about you and your main subject
steps.s1_desc: Your name appears on your profile; the main subject anchors your placement in search.
steps.s2_title: Which levels and exams do you cover?
steps.s2_desc: Pick all that apply — broader coverage means more matches.
steps.s3_desc: One strong sentence — the first thing students see on the card.
steps.s4_desc: How do you teach, what's your specialty? These texts publish on your profile as written.
steps.s5_desc: City + optional district + lesson format. Format affects whether students filtering for it find you.
steps.s6_desc: You set the range; price transparency is part of LessonRadar's brand. Your phone is only shared on approved matches.
steps.s7_desc: The summary below is how your profile will look. You can step back and fix anything before submitting.

fields.full_name_hint: As it should appear on your profile.

fields.specialty_disciplines_hint: Tap to add additional subjects you teach.

fields.exams_hint: Pick the exams you prepare students for — LGS, TYT, AYT, YKS, etc.

price_table.heading: {discipline} prices in {city}
price_table.subtitle: Computed from the {count} tutors listed on this page.
price_table.disclaimer: Computed from the hourly rates of tutors listed on this page. Individual prices vary by experience, district, and lesson format.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Practical answers for parents and students.

price.q: How much does {discipline} private tutoring cost in {city}?
price.a_with_range: Tutors listed on this page charge ₺{min}–₺{max}/hour, with a median around ₺{median}/h. Prices vary by tutor experience, online vs in-person format, and weekly hours.
price.a_no_data: {discipline} private tutoring typically ranges between ₺250–₺800/hour across Türkiye. Once tutors are listed on this page, the actual local range will appear here.

verified.a: A verified tutor is one whose identity and diploma/certification have been checked by LessonRadar. They are marked with a green badge on the profile. Unverified profiles are hidden from search results by default.

online_vs_in_person.q: Online or in-person — which works better?
online_vs_in_person.a: Both have their place. Online saves time and travel, gives you access to a wider tutor pool, and is especially efficient for exam technique and theoretical topics. In-person works better for younger students, hands-on subjects (lab work, instruments, sports), and learners who lose focus easily. Most of our tutors offer both formats.

first_lesson.q: How does the first lesson start?
first_lesson.a: Three steps: (1) tell us what you need — subject, level, goal, district; (2) verified tutors who match reach out to you; (3) take a trial lesson, then set up a regular schedule with the tutor you pick. Phone verification and KVKK consent are one-time.

response_time.a_with_data: Tutors on this page have a median response time of {response}. Top tutors usually reply within 30 minutes; off-hours requests are answered the next day.
response_time.a_no_data: Most tutors reply to a lesson request within 1–3 hours; off-hours requests are answered the next day. Non-responsive profiles are de-ranked in search results over time.

metadata.description_fallback: LessonRadar legal document — transparent information about how we protect your data, the scope of the service, and your rights.

gizlilik.title: What does this page commit to?
bullets: We collect only the data needed to deliver the service (name, email, phone, lesson preference); we don't collect anything we don't need.
We follow the KVKK and GDPR principles: purpose-limited, time-bounded processing, transparency, and your right to access and erasure.
We share data with third parties only to the extent strictly required for service operation: Google sign-in, notification infrastructure, future payment intermediation.
We do not use your data for advertising and we do not sell it; we protect it with encryption and strict access controls.

kosullar.title: What does this page commit to?
bullets: LessonRadar is an intermediary platform; the lesson contract is formed only between the teacher and the student/guardian.
We expect you to share accurate information, communicate respectfully, and obey the law.
You can delete your account at any time; data is anonymised after a 30-day safe-hold period.
Disputes are governed by Turkish law and the courts of Gaziantep.

ogretmen-sozlesmesi.title: What does this page commit to?
bullets: LessonRadar is an intermediary platform; the teacher provides the lesson as an independent service provider.
Tax, social security, and other obligations arising from lesson income are the teacher's responsibility.
No commission is charged during beta; if a commission is later introduced it will be announced at least 30 days in advance.
Either party may terminate this agreement on 30 days' written notice.

draft_banner.title: This document is a draft.
draft_banner.body: The agreement below is a preliminary draft prepared in line with industry standards. It will be reviewed by counsel before publication, and the final version will replace this draft. For that reason this page is currently not indexed by search engines.
draft_banner.contact: For comments or questions about this draft, please write to <link>{email}</link>.
